meta.title: Dirtbag Theme — Stable Tag
meta.author: Dan Knauss
meta.description: Preview the Dirtbag WordPress block theme pinned to the v0.1.0 stable tag commit.

options.blogdescription: Nothing but good bones and road grit.

steps.code:
<?php
require '/wordpress/wp-load.php';

$icon_path = get_theme_file_path( 'assets/icons/dirtbag-site-icon.png' );
if ( ! file_exists( $icon_path ) ) {
    return;
}

$upload = wp_upload_bits( 'dirtbag-site-icon.png', null, file_get_contents( $icon_path ) );
if ( ! empty( $upload['error'] ) ) {
    return;
}

$filetype      = wp_check_filetype( $upload['file'], null );
$attachment_id = wp_insert_attachment(
    array(
        'post_mime_type' => $filetype['type'],
        'post_title'     => 'Dirtbag site icon',
        'post_content'   => '',
        'post_status'    => 'inherit',
    ),
    $upload['file']
);

if ( is_wp_error( $attachment_id ) || ! $attachment_id ) {
    return;
}

require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/image.php';
$metadata = wp_generate_attachment_metadata( $attachment_id, $upload['file'] );
wp_update_attachment_metadata( $attachment_id, $metadata );
set_theme_mod( 'custom_logo', $attachment_id );
update_option( 'site_icon', $attachment_id );
